name: maintained-public-portal-genui-mcp
description: Offline Korean public-service catalog MCP for ranked portal cards, evidence rails, and reviewed handoff copy.
long_description: Runs locally through stdio and reads the bundled compiled.sqlite catalog. The runtime server never fetches public APIs, compiles the catalog, or asks users for credentials.

tools.name: search_portal_entries
tools.description: Search published public portal entries without ranking.

tools.name: rank_portal_entries
tools.description: Rank entries from structured taxonomy context.

tools.name: get_entry_detail
tools.description: Return one explicit entry record by entry_id.

tools.name: compose_genui_artifact
tools.description: Assemble reviewed GenUI cards, handoff copy, and evidence rail.
